stories.title: Project Scaffolding & Monorepo Setup
acceptanceCriteria: React Native app created at /farm-direct/mobile/ with TypeScript configured
FastAPI backend created at /farm-direct/backend/ with pyproject.toml or requirements.txt
PostgreSQL SQLAlchemy models defined for all entities (User, FarmerProfile, Product, Category, Order, OrderItem, Review, Payment, Notification, PriceSuggestion, DemandForecast)
Alembic migration setup initialized
Project runs without import errors: backend starts with uvicorn, mobile app compiles with npx expo start

stories.title: Firebase Auth Integration (Backend + Mobile)
acceptanceCriteria: Firebase config files exist for mobile (google-services.json placeholder, firebase config)
Backend endpoint POST /api/auth/register creates user with role (farmer/consumer) after verifying Firebase token
Backend endpoint POST /api/auth/login verifies Firebase ID token and returns JWT + user profile
Mobile has login/signup screens with email and social login buttons wired to Firebase Auth SDK
Mobile has onboarding slides screen and role selection (farmer/consumer)
Protected API routes return 401 without valid token

stories.title: Product CRUD & Search (Backend API + Mobile Screens)
acceptanceCriteria: Backend CRUD endpoints: POST/GET/PUT/DELETE /api/products with farmer auth
GET /api/products supports query params: category, search, min_price, max_price, region, sort_by, page
GET /api/products/{id} returns product detail with farmer profile and AI suggested price
GET /api/categories returns category list
Mobile: Home screen shows recommended products, categories, AI price trend widget
Mobile: Product list screen with search bar, filters, infinite scroll
Mobile: Product detail screen showing farmer info, photos, price, AI suggested price, add-to-cart button
Mobile: Farmer can register/edit/delete products from dashboard

stories.title: Cart, Order & PG Payment Integration
acceptanceCriteria: Backend: POST/GET/PUT/DELETE /api/cart endpoints for cart management
Backend: POST /api/orders creates order from cart items
Backend: POST /api/payments/prepare initiates PG payment (토스페이먼츠/아임포트 SDK integration)
Backend: POST /api/payments/confirm verifies and confirms payment callback
Backend: GET /api/orders returns user order history with status
Mobile: Cart screen with quantity controls, item removal, total calculation
Mobile: Checkout screen with shipping address input and PG payment flow
Mobile: Order confirmation screen after successful payment
Farmer dashboard: Order management (list, status update: new/processing/complete)

stories.title: AI Demand Forecasting & Price Optimization Engine
acceptanceCriteria: Backend ML module at backend/ml/ with Prophet or LSTM model for demand forecasting
Seed data: historical agricultural price/demand dataset loaded into PostgreSQL
GET /api/ai/demand-forecast?category={cat}&period={period} returns predicted demand with confidence interval
GET /api/ai/price-suggestion?product_id={id} returns AI-suggested optimal price based on supply/demand analysis
GET /api/ai/price-trends returns price trend data for major produce categories
Model training script exists and can be run to retrain on new data
Mobile: Farmer dashboard shows demand forecast chart (weekly/monthly) from API
Mobile: Farmer dashboard shows AI price optimization suggestions
Mobile: Home screen price trend widget displays real data from API

stories.title: Reviews, Notifications & MyPage
acceptanceCriteria: Backend: POST /api/reviews with rating (1-5), text, photos for completed orders only
Backend: GET /api/products/{id}/reviews returns paginated reviews
Backend: POST /api/notifications and GET /api/notifications for push notification records
Mobile: Review writing screen (star rating, text input, photo upload) accessible after order completion
Mobile: Product detail shows review list with average rating
Mobile: MyPage screen with profile edit, order history, wishlist, settings
Mobile: Notification list screen showing order status changes and AI price alerts
Mobile: Farmer dashboard shows sales statistics summary
